output_summary: Authored seed decision record: reconciled 6 brief↔PRD conflicts (brief wins: Pi 3B, portrait 1080x1920, v1+v2, USB cache), BOM with gap-fill assumptions, Python+vanilla-JS arch honoring 3B ceiling, §13/§12 carried verbatim, v2 zoned layout, 9-row open-assumptions registry.

8 BLOCKING (GPIO3 RTC/button conflict; Openbox-or-labwc = human decision; Pi3B Chromium feasibility not designed to ceiling; portrait touch under-specified; USB ext4 power-loss resilience; fan/power pin4 mislabeled GPIO; offline doc vs online pip; v1/v2 scope ambiguity), 4 NON-BLOCKING (git-pull-on-cron brittle; weather degradation; concrete audio rate limit; mounting strain/heat/service), 3 SUGGESTION (source-of-truth wiring table; /health page; v1 cert without v2).
critique: Adversarial, concrete, evidence-backed. All blocking findings valid.

output_summary: Adopted 14/15. B1: button->GPIO17(pin11), RTC owns GPIO2/3. B2: locked Bookworm Lite32+Xorg+Openbox+unclutter+Chromium. B3: added Pi3B Performance Contract (gpu_mem=128, Chromium flags, no compositor, DOM cap, RAM>=200MB target+fallback ladder). B4: xrandr rotate+xinput matrix+4-corner verify, touch interactions=v2. B5: UUID mount nofail/noatime, atomic temp+os.replace writes, bounded freq, microSD read-only fallback. B6: relabeled 5V rail not GPIO, low-current fan+guard+strain relief, undervoltage check. B7: clarified offline=document not build (Wi-Fi prereq), +pinned requirements +vendored wheelhouse. B8: v1=required complete build w/ own cert, v2=separate level-up. NB1-4+S1-3 adopted (manual update, weather cache, audio<=1/load+1/10min, mounting checklist, wiring table H, /health endpoint, v1 cert).
critique: One clarification not pure-adopt: B7 offline semantics.
deltas_adopted: Added section H wiring table, section I performance contract, section J updated assumptions (A1-A12). Superseded draft C/E/F where in conflict.

output_summary: gemini-skipped: pi/google not provisioned (sys_list_models shows pi worker source=none, no model provider). Running Claude<->Codex cross-vendor core per brief §5.

GO. All 8 previously-blocking issues resolved against contract; no still-blocking conflicts. Watch-items for implementation: (1) ensure final record includes wiring table + Pi3B perf contract + v1/v2 criteria verbatim; (2) make /health, BOOYAH rate-limit, USB fallback, 24h no-OOM TESTABLE not tutorial-only claims; (3) treat portrait touch transform + undervoltage as acceptance steps.
deltas_adopted: Carry 3 watch-items into implementation acceptance contracts.

output_summary: DESIGN PASS COMPLETE in 1 cycle (Codex GO, Gemini skipped). Decision record locked. Proceeding to implementation relay: artifacts queued = [01-fetch-cache-service, 02-ics-event-model, 03-kiosk-frontend-v1, 04-theming-booyah, 05-systemd-provisioning, 06-health-endpoint, 07-wiring-diagrams, 08-tutorial-v1, 09-v2-hub, 10-tutorial-v2]. v1 is the required minimum build; v2 = level-up.
